Class DoubleHaul

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.fishing.skill.ability.DoubleHaul
All Implemented Interfaces:
Ability, ActiveAbility
public final class DoubleHaul extends Object implements ActiveAbility
Active ability unlocked at level 15.

When activated, the player's next catch yields a second copy of the item, delivered one tick after the original to ensure proper inventory handling.

    • COOLDOWN_ID

      public static final String COOLDOWN_ID
      Cooldown key used with CooldownManager.

  • Constructor Details

    • DoubleHaul

      public DoubleHaul(Supplier<FishingSkillConfig> config, CooldownManager cooldownManager, Set<UUID> pendingSet, org.bukkit.plugin.Plugin plugin)
      Parameters:
      config - supplier for the current config snapshot
      cooldownManager - the shared cooldown manager
      pendingSet - the set tracking whose next catch is duplicated
      plugin - the owning plugin, used to schedule the delayed item delivery

  • Method Details

    • id

      public String id()
      Specified by:
      id in interface Ability
      Returns:
      the namespaced identifier, e.g. "fishing:patient-angler"

      public String name()
      Specified by:
      name in interface Ability
      Returns:
      the player-facing display name, e.g. "Patient Angler"

      public String description()
      Specified by:
      description in interface Ability
      Returns:
      a short player-facing description of what the ability does

      public int unlockLevel()
      Specified by:
      unlockLevel in interface Ability
      Returns:
      the skill level at which this ability is unlocked

    • onActivate

      public void onActivate(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, UUID uuid)
      Called by the framework when the player activates this ability. Checks cooldown and pending state, then marks the next catch for duplication.
      Specified by:
      onActivate in interface ActiveAbility
      Parameters:
      player - the player who triggered the ability
      uuid - the player's UUID

    • selectionStatus

      public String selectionStatus(UUID uuid)
      Short MiniMessage status string shown as item lore in the ability selection GUI.
      Specified by:
      selectionStatus in interface ActiveAbility
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      Returns:
      a MiniMessage status string

    • statusLevel

      public StatusLevel statusLevel(UUID uuid)
      Description copied from interface: ActiveAbility
      Returns the current state of this ability for GUI display purposes. The ActiveAbilityCoordinator uses this to select an appropriate display material without parsing the ActiveAbility.selectionStatus(UUID) string.

      Defaults to StatusLevel.READY. Override whenever the ability has pending, cooldown, or active-buff states.

      Specified by:
      statusLevel in interface ActiveAbility
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      Returns:
      the current status level

    • applyOnCatch

      public void applyOnCatch(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, UUID uuid, org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack caught, PassiveTrigger trigger)
      Gives the player a second copy of the caught item if this catch is pending. The clone is delivered two ticks later so the original item lands in inventory first.
      Parameters:
      player - the catching player
      uuid - the player's UUID
      caught - the item that was caught
      trigger - the catch trigger to record the contribution on
